title: Pescatoria violacea
taxonomy: Pescatoria violacea belongs to the family Pleurothallidinae, which is a sub tribe of the orchid family, Orchidaceae. This sub tribe is commonly known as the "pleurothallis orchids." Pescatoria violacea is a genus of epiphytic orchids, meaning that they grow on other plants without deriving nutrients from them. The species is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of countries such as Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru. Within the genus Pescatoria, Pescatoria violacea is one of the many species known for their unique and colorful blooms.
